title: Roblox Text Art: Copy & Paste Man Face & Character Dot Art
meta_description: Roblox text art for chat and bios — man face style dot art, blocky smiles, emote one-liners, and GG banners. Click any piece to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Deadpan man-face-style dot art, blocky smiles, and chat emotes sized for Roblox chat. Click any piece to copy it instantly.
intro: Roblox text art is small character art built to survive the Roblox chat box — deadpan man-face-style approximations, blocky smiles, and one-line emotes drawn with braille and block characters. Because Roblox chat has limited length and strict filtering, the best pieces stay compact and use plain Unicode rather than emojis. Copy a complete face below in one click, or build your own from the chat-safe blocks and dot characters in each section. For username glyphs and decorations, see our separate Roblox Symbols page.
